prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `dd2401ed`.
codex_response:
Implemented `dd2401ed` end-to-end. The rule is: move the full-height gray bar to one column beyond the farthest mirrored blue extent on its left, then recolor the red cells in the gap to blue only if every blue left-offset is represented by at least one red cell at the same right-offset. No new primitive was needed.

`arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded because it predicts unconditional in-gap recoloring, which official example 3 disproves. `arc2_opus46_summary.json` was used as the working hint. The generator matches the task family by keeping the official 7x15 layout, a single full-height gray bar, sparse blue singleton noise on the left, sparse red singleton noise on the right, and by deliberately producing both matched and unmatched gap-offset cases.

Validation passed: official verifier `5/5`, generated verifier `1000/1000`, artifacts built successfully, and `preview_01.png` was visually sanity-checked against the originals.
